callibri.title: Callibri - Lead Management Platform
callibri.description: Development and redesign of key company products: 'Multitracking' and 'Email-tracking'
callibri.fullDescription:
**Responsibilities:**
– Development and redesign of key company products ('Multitracking', 'Email-tracking') (80% of MT frontend codebase, 100% of ET codebase).
– Implementation of UX/UI logic for client-side
– Code-review and team mentoring
– Preparation of project documentation and reports
– Cross-functional interaction with departments

**Key Achievements:**
– Conducted complete redesign of flagship product 'Multitracking', improving user personal account convenience (30% reduction in support requests for setup).
– Led redesign of 'Email-tracking' product and implemented entire client-side of the project (90% reduction in support requests for setup).
– Initiated rework of admin panel for landings, improving UX for marketing teams (added about 10 new features for content creation).
– Development of interactive statistics dashboard with report import capability. (35% of codebase)

**Main Tasks:**
- Writing program code
- Refactoring program code
- Development and maintenance of client-side web application
- Fixing identified bugs
- Implementation of functionality and program logic according to technical specifications and architectural solutions
- Development of user interface, including its interactive elements

simpleIt.title: Simple IT - Corporate Applications
simpleIt.description: Development of client-side admin panels and server logic for corporate applications
simpleIt.fullDescription:
**Responsibilities:**
– Development of client-side admin panels and server logic for corporate applications
– Interaction with clients and development team
– Code-review and technical documentation maintenance

**Key Achievements:**
– Developed admin panel for corporate application 'Group VIS', fully covering UI/UX tasks (100% of admin panel codebase).
– Served as teamlead on SLOT project (powerbank sharing): wrote server part with multiple TCP connections support and admin panel integration.
– Enhanced 'Change Me' service: implemented new functionality and fixed critical bugs, which increased traffic and conversion.

cablewalker.title: CableWalker - Drone Management
cablewalker.description: Development of corporate website, admin panel and software for CableWalker Class drone management
cablewalker.fullDescription:
**Responsibilities:**
– Development of corporate website and admin panel (SEO improvement from 70% to 99%)
– Creation of desktop and mobile applications for CableWalker Class drone management
– Implementation of client and server parts of software

**Key Achievements:**
– Completely rewrote corporate website in React with admin panel for content management (100% codebase update, clients stay on site 25% longer than usual).
– Developed MVP mobile and desktop software for CableWalker Class drone management, including teacher software and server part. (80% of codebase written from scratch).
– Successfully demonstrated product at investor and client presentations
– Transferred project to next team for industrial operation.

medicos.title: MEDICOS - Medical CRM System
medicos.description: Development of CRM system for newborn tracking in pathology department of ODKB Yekaterinburg
medicos.fullDescription:
**Responsibilities:**
– Development of CRM system for newborn tracking in pathology department of ODKB Yekaterinburg
– Implementation of client-side and UI/UX design
– Communication with client and users for requirements gathering
– Testing and implementation of ready solution

**Key Achievements:**
– Created CRM system from scratch, fully covering frontend tasks (100% of codebase)
– Ensured correct accounting and storage of patient data
– System successfully implemented and used in medical institution
– Project was delivered and recognized as successful by the client (reduced new patient processing time from 1 hour to 25 minutes).

contacts.title: Contacts
